title: PROJECT 48 - 211info
text: PROJECT 48 PROJECT 48 Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides tailored bags with essential items for foster children entering care, including clothing, hair care products, and LGBTQ2S+ sensitive options. Offers a six-week program for youth aging out of foster care, featuring workshops on financial literacy, resume building, and interview preparation. Confidential Address Eligibility: Foster youth ages 7-23 Hours: Varies Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Resource parents must contact the ODHS Caseworker to make the request through the website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Children's Clothing * Foster Children Life Skills Education * Foster Children Personal/Grooming Supplies * Foster Children Shoes * Foster Children If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PROJECT 48
